prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类主流专业方向社会热度高热/推荐，报考意愿较强；本省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年1733 47人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓解；西北大学位于陕西西安，属邻省，对本省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在本省招生占比 逐年提升（2021年约2.0%→2025年约4.7%），2026年计划进一步大幅增加，显示对本省生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招（+65.6%）带 来的竞争加剧、本省考生小幅减少（-3.4%）的缓解作用、声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般的抑制效应，以及软件工程A-等优势学科对相关专业的吸引力，在2025年基准16578名基础上 ，结合考生减少和声誉因素小幅回调；预测最低位次约23056名，区间22556–23556名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 10345 → 18317 → 10521 → 16711 → 16578. The abnormal high ranking in 2022 (18317) was due to batch structure adjustments. In recent three years, the baseline ranking fluctuated between 16500 and 16800, with a 2025 baseline of about 16578. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category increased from 45 in 2021 to 46 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 54 in 2024, and 64 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 106, a significant increase of about 65.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 70th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 65–70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism incident of Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the College of Liberal Arts. The university has established a special task force to investigate, which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 81st (average), with medium to low short video exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps or breaks were observed. Geology (A), Archaeology (A), and Software Engineering (A-) are strong disciplines, with Software Engineering corresponding to majors like Software Engineering (Intelligent Software Innovation Experimental Class) in Physics Category, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Mainstream Physics Category majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity and are recommended, with strong application willingness. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a neighboring province, and has strong geographical appeal to local candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in the province has been increasing year by year (from about 2.0% in 2021 to about 4.7% in 2025), and the 2026 plan further significantly increases, showing emphasis on local students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trends, intensified competition due to the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+65.6%), the slight easing effect from the small decrease in local candidates (-3.4%), the suppression effect from negative reputation and average Douyin popularity, and the attraction of advantageous disciplines like Software Engineering (A-) to related majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 16578, with slight adjustments due to candidate decrease and reputation factors, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23056, with a range of 22556–23556.

For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 22556), prioritize reaching for top-tier flagship majors. Tier 3 majors (Economic Statistics, Urban and Rural Planning, Emergency Management) are suitable as safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1510 → 1549 → 1701 → 3715 → 2164. In 2024, due to batch merger/subject reform, there was an abnormal fluctuation (3715), which returned to 2164 in 2025. The baseline ranking in the past 3 years is in the 1700–2200 range. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category: 2021: 21 → 2022: 20 → 2023: 22 → 2024: 18 → 2025: 23, with minor fluctuations overall. The 2026 plan is 24, a slight expansion of about 4.3% compared to 2025, leading to slightly increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking around 70th in 2026, stable in recent years, a mid-to-upper level comprehensive university. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism incident of Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature, which may somewhat suppress application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking 81st (average), short video exposure moderately low. No obvious admission gaps recorded. Archaeology A, directly corresponding to the Archaeology major in History Category enrollment, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. Geology A, Software Engineering A- have weak correlation with History Category.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other mainstream History Category majors are socially recommended; teacher training/education majors are in a wait-and-see state. In 2026, the province has 63,113 History Category candidates, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, greatly easing competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a neighboring province, with strong regional appeal to local candidates. The university's provincial enrollment plan for History Category has been stable at 18–24 in recent years, with 24 in 2026 being the highest in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+4.3%), the significant reduction in provincial candidates (-25.6%) easing competition, the strong appeal of Archaeology A to high-scoring segments, and the suppressive effect of negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 2164, with a slight adjustment due to the large decrease in candidates; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2190, with a range of 1795–2585.
